name: Professor Messer
note: Free, complete video courses for CompTIA A+, Network+, and Security+ — the most widely recommended free study resource in the CompTIA community. Follow along with your next cert.

name: NetworkChuck (YouTube)
note: Entry-level IT and networking career content, home-lab project ideas (matches the Skill-Building Projects above), and certification roadmaps.

name: Indeed Career Guide
note: Resume, interview, and career-change articles/videos from one of the job boards you're already using to search.

name: Google IT Support Professional Certificate (Coursera)
note: A structured, well-known follow-on path if you want more guided study after A+ — free to audit the course content, paid only for the certificate.
